title: Creative Menu: Reloaded
description: Replaces creative menu tab icons with consistent flat sprites through vanilla shader modifications.
body:
# Creative Menu: Reloaded
*Transforms the creative menu tab icons from a mixture of 3D renders and 2D sprites into a consistent set of purely 2D sprite designs. Each icon features an elegant drop shadow for visual emphasis and improved readability. This pack utilizes custom shader modifications to seamlessly replace default models by targeting a transparent red pixel in the top left corner of each sprite.*

## Features
  - Converted all tab icons to consistent 2D sprite designs
  - Replaced several boring icons with brand new sprites
  - Added stylish drop shadows to enhance visual appeal

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
